summary: Fixed numeric claim regression introduced by PR #1157 (ShellForge v3.0). Text claims (meta tags, section headings, prose) had stale values while stat counter data-targets were already correct. Fixed invariants (22→24), destructive patterns (87→93), event kinds (49→47), action types (27→41, 9→10 classes), invariant heading (21→24), CLI heading (29→34), CLI counter (36→34). No open issues or PRs.

siteBuild.notes: Static site structure valid: index.html, posts.html, posts.json, sitemap.xml, robots.txt, og-image.png all present. ShellForge page added by #1157.

drift.cause: PR #1157 re-introduced stale 22 count in text claims while stat counter was already correct at 24

drift.cause: PR #1157 reset text to 87; stat counter was already 93
